::: hero
# Eric Spencer

Quantitative Analyst \| Statistical Research \| Decision-Making Under Uncertainty

I study how people form beliefs and make decisions under uncertainty, with a focus on Bayesian models and real-world behavior.

[Read the Blog](posts.qmd){.button-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Current Work

### Bayesian Conformity and Decision-Making

This project explores how individuals update beliefs and influence one another in group settings using Bayesian models.

It combines simulation, theory, and interpretation to better understand how collective decisions emerge under uncertainty.

[Start the Series](posts.qmd){.button-link}
